title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other models locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, and browsers via the Ollama REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM, chat, or embeddings endpoints in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-model chat, file uploads, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama offering synchronous/asynchronous APIs and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI chat tool built on ollama-js with conversation history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community cookbook with recipes for function calling, JSON mode, vision models, and advanced prompting.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with auto-scaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store and Streamlit frontend.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats and generates images using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client library for Ollama with async support and native JSON parsing.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama with tokio and serde.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision Ollama on AWS EC2 with GPU and pre-loaded models.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django package adding Ollama model backends for chat and embeddings with admin integration.

title: ollama-go
summary: Community-maintained Go SDK for Ollama with context-managed chat sessions and model management.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that leverages Ollama for internal Q&A and summarization, deployed via Bolt framework.

title: ollama-model-gallery
summary: Curated list of community-tuned models (Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama) ready to pull and run with Ollama.
